title: Android SQLite Database Architecture & Interaction Flow
description: A visual breakdown of the core components involved in using an SQLite database within an Android application and the sequence of interactions between them.
relationships: The Application UI interacts with the Data Model. The Data Model is persisted/retrieved by the SQLiteOpenHelper, which creates/opens the SQLiteDatabase instance. The SQLiteDatabase instance performs CRUD operations on the SQLite Database File. A ContentProvider can act as an optional abstraction layer between the Model and the SQLiteOpenHelper for secure data sharing.
